title: The Unique Nature of WebApps
description: A central mindmap illustrating the distinct characteristics that differentiate Web Applications from traditional software, branching out into key conceptual categories.
relationships: Branch: Network Intensiveness is a defining trait of WebApps
Branch: Concurrency is a major concern for WebApps
Branch: Continuous Evolution describes the lifecycle of WebApps
Branch: Multidisciplinary Development is required for WebApps
Branch: User Diversity is a key consideration for WebApps
Branch: Security Criticality is a heightened priority for WebApps
Branch: Performance is a critical success factor for WebApps
Branch: Aesthetics is a fundamental element of WebApps
